idea-plugin.name: PatchTalk
idea-plugin.description:
PatchTalk adds local review-style comment threads to JetBrains editors without requiring a pull request.

Comments stay inside the IDE, show up in the line-number gutter, open in a dedicated tool window, and are available to any MCP-compatible coding agent such as Codex.

  • File-level and line-level local comment threads
  • Reply, resolve, and reopen workflows inside the IDE
  • JetBrains MCP tools for listing, reading, creating, replying, and resolving threads
  • Project-local persistence under .idea
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0

  • First public PatchTalk release.
  • Rebranded the plugin for agent-agnostic MCP workflows.
  • Polished the thread list and conversation UI.
  • Added gutter icons in the line-number lane.
  • Added Marketplace, README, license, and CI release assets.

action.description: Add a local PatchTalk comment for the current line
Add a local PatchTalk comment for the current file
